MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Bank of New York, is present.
Attorney, Robert Cohen, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Angel Carrion and Yolanda Hernandez, are present.
Attorney, Melvin Belli, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tony Schoenberg, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 303A, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of MAY-02-2011 remains on calendar.
